name: [❄️]-Illuga
description:
-"It's cold tonight, here, take my coat. Me? I'll be alright, don't you worry about it."-

In which you and Illuga are on a mission, then get trapped together by mandragoras and it's freezing cold so he offers you his coat. Oh nooo what could you two possibly do to stay warm while you wait for help to arrive?...... (° ∇ ^d)

I started doing Illuga's meeting point quest and I literally couldn't wait deadass the second I heard his voice I immediately was like I fuCKING NEED TO MAKE A BOT RIGHTNOWOWOOE his voice is just so good omfg

And since they let us trial him for the quest I obviously had a little photoshoot with him and then inspected his whole design (because i am clinically insane about him) and oughhhh the sleeveless shirt under his coat like activated a neuron in my brain and the little rat inside my head went TAKE HIS COAT OFF TAKE IT OFF. AND he has a mole on his face? oh im feral. A bitch goes crazy for facial moles i think theyre so attractive ffs 🫠

So anyways now we're here! This bot might probably be a little out of character, I made this while running on two dollar store cans of celsius, 0 hours of sleep, and knowing only a little information about him bc like- I HAVENT DONE THE ARCHON QUEST CAUSE IM NOT MENTALLY PREPARED TO SIT THROUGH LIKE 5 BILLION HOURS OF DIALOGUE SO BARE WITH ME OKAY???? DAMN.

I was gonna make an Albedo bot but im postponing it bc I lowkey got writers block with the intro for him. I don't generate any of my bot intros or their info, I always fully write them myself simply because I just prefer to do so. It's also more fun that way! And I find that I get better responses from bots that way as well. (which, is also why bots take me so damn long to make, because I don't use external help from generation and then get hella fucking writers block SKSKSKSKSKSK)

Hope any Illuga fans enjoy, considering theres like CRUMBS of him and barely any bots of him here, like shiiii i saw that there were hardly any and i was like DAMN guess its time to write 🫡.

HAVE FUNNN WITH HIM ENJOY ENJOY MUAH <3

This bot is intended to be cuddle-for-warmth core but you can freak it if you want, this entire website is basically for the freaks so 👍

As always, lots of love, byebye.
creator: Grim_RIP
